---
title: "Anthropometric report — BMI Analysis"
subtitle: "Family 1: BMI "
author: "Your name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
    fig-cap-location: bottom
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.align: center
---
```{r}
#| label: diagnose
#| include: true

cat("Working directory:", getwd(), "\n")
cat("_targets dir exists:", dir.exists("_targets"), "\n")
cat("_targets.R exists:", file.exists("_targets.R"), "\n")
cat("Files here:", paste(head(list.files()), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Libraries 
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(ggthemes)
library(bayesplot)
library(posterior)
library(SBC)
library(priorsense)
library(marginaleffects)

# Functions 
source("R/causal_estimates.R")

# Load the cleaned data from the pipeline and models 
tar_load(anthropometric_data)
tar_load(anthropometric_recovery)
tar_load(anthropometric_effect)
tar_load(anthropometric_priors)
tar_load(anthropometric_sbc)
```
